untranslatable_reason: Signal requires calculating price deviation in standard deviations from 50-period MA (3.0 stdev threshold), identifying reversal candles with opposite momentum, and volume exceeding 20-period average by 150%. These require custom calculations not available in the allowed indicator set. The allowed indicators do not include: standard deviation bands around MA, momentum divergence detection, or normalized volume deviation metrics. Only approximated using price position relative to sma_50 and vol_ratio_20.
translation_notes: CONTEXT_DEPENDENT direction cannot be directly expressed in this schema. Provided separate LONG and SHORT entry/exit conditions as a workaround. The 3.0 stdev deviation, reversal candle detection, and momentum confirmation cannot be accurately represented with allowed indicators. vol_ratio_20 is used as proxy for volume confirmation but does not match the specified 150% threshold over 20-period average. Stop loss set to 1.5 (representing 1.5x deviation magnitude) as approximation.
